title: agrostis pumila
intro: Agrostis pumila, also known as Dwarf Brome or Short Brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agrostis pumila include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Agrostis pumila typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
